errors: The ELM implementation has several discrepancies with the CPG requirements.
The ELM implementation has several mismatches with the CPG requirements.

The ELM implementation has a mismatch in the age threshold. The CPG requires Age >= 15 years AND Age <= 65 years, while the ELM implementation uses Age >= 30 years. This significantly alters the screening recommendation.  The time interval is correct (1 year), but the age threshold is incorrect.

The ELM implementation has a mismatch in the age threshold. The CPG states “Age >= 18 years”, while the ELM implementation specifies “Age >= 25 years”. This violates the inclusion criteria. Additionally, the time interval for “Has Recent Alcohol Screening” is set to “1 years”, while the CPG does not specify a time interval, only stating “within the past 1 year”.
